# AgentLaunchOps

Paid developer source kits for SaaS billing, license keys, metered APIs, and Stripe revenue operations.

## Live Paid Products

- Stripe SaaS Billing Toolkit Bundle ($79): six Node source kits for Stripe SaaS billing workflows: team seats, usage alerts, MRR analytics, invoice tax, cancel-save, and metered API access.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-saas-billing-kits-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/qmcpos
- GHA Guard Pro Kit ($29): GitHub Actions security source kit with workflow checks, safe auto-fixes, PR reports, and hardened templates.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/github-actions-security-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/auqpvm
- GitHub Actions Workflow Scanner for Node Repos ($29): buyer guide for local workflow scanning with the live GHA Guard Pro Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/github-actions-workflow-scanner.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/auqpvm
- GitHub Actions Permissions Hardening for Node Repos ($29): buyer guide for tightening token permissions, checkout credentials, and least-privilege workflow defaults with the live GHA Guard Pro Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/github-actions-permissions-hardening.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/auqpvm
- License Launch Kit ($25): Node source kit for license issuing and verification.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/license-key-server-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/license_launch_kit2026
- Stripe Team Seat Kit ($29): Node source kit for per-seat Stripe subscription syncing.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-per-seat-billing-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/vpbnu
- Stripe Team Seat Kit Product Page ($29): Gumroad-first page for the live source package.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-team-seat-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/vpbnu
- Stripe Usage Alerts Kit ($29): Node source kit for usage thresholds and billing warnings.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-usage-alerts-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/aohsrs
- Stripe Usage Alerts Kit Product Page ($29): Gumroad-first page for the live source package.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-usage-alerts-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/aohsrs
- Stripe Usage Limit Notifications for Node ($29): buyer guide for quota warnings, limit-reached notices, overage alerts, and monthly usage summaries backed by the live Stripe Usage Alerts Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-usage-limit-notifications-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/aohsrs
- Stripe MRR Analytics Kit ($29): Node source kit for recurring revenue snapshots.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-mrr-analytics-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/juzzin
- Stripe MRR Dashboard for Node ($29): buyer guide for MRR dashboard, ARR snapshot, churn metric, paid invoice, refund, and subscription revenue analytics searches backed by the live Stripe MRR Analytics Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-mrr-dashboard-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/juzzin
- Stripe Invoice Tax Kit ($29): Node source kit for invoice tax metadata review.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-invoice-tax-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/knpcbo
- Metered API Launch Kit ($29): Node source kit for API keys, usage logs, quotas, and Stripe checkout hooks.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/metered-api-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/lygkci
- Stripe Cancel Save Kit ($29): Node source kit for cancellation reasons and save-offer handling.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-cancel-save-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/ogodr

- AI Credits Billing Kit ($29): Node source kit for usage-credit pricing, Stripe credit packs, reservation holds, finalized refunds, and idempotent AI consumption.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/ai-credits-billing-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/wjfxhu

- Clerk Stripe Org Kit ($29): Node source kit for Clerk organizations, Stripe subscriptions, org seats, entitlement syncing, and webhook-safe access checks.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/clerk-stripe-org-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/ghekag

- Clerk Stripe Org Webhooks for Node ($29): buyer guide for Clerk organization billing, Stripe subscription webhooks, org seats, entitlement snapshots, and access checks backed by the live Clerk Stripe Org Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/clerk-stripe-org-webhooks-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/ghekag

- Lemon Squeezy Subscription Kit ($29): Node source kit for Lemon Squeezy subscription webhooks, entitlement records, customer state, and buyer smoke tests.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/lemon-squeezy-subscription-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/wcxuo

- Lemon Squeezy Webhooks for Node ($29): buyer guide mapping Lemon Squeezy webhook and subscription entitlement searches to the live Lemon Squeezy Subscription Kit checkout.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/lemon-squeezy-webhooks-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/wcxuo

- Stripe Connect Marketplace Kit ($29): Node source kit for Stripe Connect marketplace onboarding, seller account state, transfers, and webhook idempotency.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-connect-marketplace-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/kusejgu

- Stripe Connect Webhooks for Node ($29): buyer guide mapping account.updated, seller readiness, destination-charge, platform-fee, and checkout reconciliation searches to the live Stripe Connect Marketplace Kit checkout.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-connect-webhooks-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/kusejgu

- Stripe Customer Portal Kit ($19): Node source kit for Stripe Customer Portal sessions, return-url checks, subscription state, and authenticated account access.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-customer-portal-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/gdqea

- Stripe Webhook Replay Kit ($19): Node source kit for Stripe webhook event storage, replay, idempotent handlers, and failed-event recovery workflows.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-webhook-replay-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/wfhzbp

- Supabase Entitlement Kit ($29): Node and SQL source kit for Supabase workspace plans, seats, RLS-readable billing state, and server-side feature gates.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/supabase-entitlement-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/cwrhl

- Supabase RLS Tenant Kit ($29): Supabase SQL and Node source kit for tenant tables, RLS policies, membership checks, and buyer smoke verification.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/supabase-rls-tenant-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/ipqgkx

## Comparison Page

- Stripe SaaS Billing Toolkit Bundle ($79): Gumroad bundle for six live Stripe billing source kits.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-saas-billing-kits-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/qmcpos
- GitHub Actions Workflow Scanner for Node Repos: buyer guide mapping workflow scanner searches to the live paid GHA Guard Pro Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/github-actions-workflow-scanner.html
- GitHub Actions Permissions Hardening for Node Repos: buyer guide mapping permission-hardening searches to the live paid GHA Guard Pro Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/github-actions-permissions-hardening.html
- Stripe Billing Boilerplate for Node SaaS: broader buyer guide mapping Stripe billing boilerplate searches to the six live paid Stripe source kits.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-billing-boilerplate-node.html
- Stripe Subscription Billing for Node SaaS: buyer guide mapping subscription billing workflow searches to the six live paid Stripe source kits.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-subscription-billing-node.html
- Stripe Checkout Subscriptions for Node SaaS: buyer guide mapping Stripe Checkout subscription workflow searches to the six live paid Stripe source kits.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-checkout-subscriptions-node.html
- Stripe Subscription Management for Node SaaS: buyer guide mapping subscription management workflow searches to the six live paid Stripe source kits.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-subscription-management-node.html
- Stripe Billing Portal Integration for Node ($19): buyer guide mapping Stripe billing portal and Customer Portal integration searches to the live Stripe Customer Portal Kit checkout.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-customer-portal-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/gdqea
- Stripe Billing Dashboard for Node SaaS: buyer guide mapping billing dashboard searches to live paid source kits for SaaS billing UI workflows.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-billing-dashboard-node.html
- Stripe Metered Billing for Node SaaS: buyer guide mapping metered billing workflow searches to live paid usage-based billing source kits.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-metered-billing-node.html
- Stripe Usage Based Billing for Node SaaS: buyer guide mapping usage-based billing searches to live paid metered API, usage alerts, MRR analytics, invoice tax, and cancel-save source kits.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-usage-based-billing-node.html
- Stripe Webhook Billing for Node SaaS: buyer guide mapping Stripe webhook billing searches to live paid Stripe source kits for seats, usage alerts, revenue snapshots, invoice tax review, cancel-save flows, and metered API access.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-webhook-billing-node.html
- Stripe Webhook Replay for Node: buyer guide mapping failed Stripe webhook replay searches to the live Stripe Webhook Replay Kit checkout.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-webhook-replay-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/wfhzbp
- Stripe Webhook Idempotency for Node: buyer guide mapping duplicate Stripe event, retry-safe handler, and replay-lock searches to the live Stripe Webhook Replay Kit checkout.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-webhook-idempotency-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/wfhzbp
- Stripe SaaS Starter Kit for Node: buyer guide mapping Stripe SaaS starter kit searches to the six live paid Stripe source kits.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-saas-starter-kit-node.html
